caption: Particles released by mouse peritoneal macrophages onto the surrounding substrate are enriched in accessible cholesterol but not sphingomyelin-sequestered cholesterol.Mouse peritoneal macrophages were plated onto poly-D-lysine–coated glass coverslips and incubated overnight in medium containing 10% FBS and either an FAK inhibitor (CAS 4506-66-5, 2 μM) or vehicle (DMSO) alone.
